action.reasoning: Observation: The previous per-group q-weight experiment failed only because the generated checkpoint's ensemble_output_weights had the wrong shape, so no eval was submitted. Current best remains ensemble_group.pt at mean_r2≈0.4990. Analysis: With one iteration left, retraining is not appropriate; the only worthwhile action is a low-cost inference-only retry that fixes the checkpoint schema and smoke-tests predict.py before submission. Decision: Recreate the q-adjusted per-output ensemble with explicit [2,128] weights, verify local prediction, then submit it for evaluation.
action.command: python make_group_q45.py && python predict.py --data_path tmp_smoke_group_q45 --checkpoint checkpoints/ensemble_group_q45.pt --output tmp_smoke_group_q45/out.json
